name: convert_html_to_pdf
description: Convert HTML files to a PDF document using Gotenberg's Chromium rendering engine. The request must be sent as multipart/form-data. You must include at least one file named 'index.html' containing the main HTML content. You can optionally include additional assets (CSS, images) as separate files in the same request. The response is the generated PDF binary. Supports page configuration via form fields for margins, paper size, scale, and more.

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: One or more files to convert. The main HTML file must be named 'index.html'. Additional files (CSS, images, fonts) can be included and referenced from the HTML. Sent as multipart/form-data file fields.

parameters.name: paperWidth
parameters.description: Paper width in inches. Default is '8.5' (Letter). Use '8.27' for A4.

parameters.name: paperHeight
parameters.description: Paper height in inches. Default is '11' (Letter). Use '11.7' for A4.

parameters.name: marginTop
parameters.description: Top margin in inches. Default is '0.39'.

parameters.name: marginBottom
parameters.description: Bottom margin in inches. Default is '0.39'.

parameters.name: marginLeft
parameters.description: Left margin in inches. Default is '0.39'.

parameters.name: marginRight
parameters.description: Right margin in inches. Default is '0.39'.

parameters.name: landscape
parameters.description: Set to 'true' for landscape orientation. Default is 'false'.

parameters.name: scale
parameters.description: Scale of the page rendering. Default is '1.0'. Range is 0.1 to 2.0.

parameters.name: preferCssPageSize
parameters.description: Set to 'true' to use CSS-defined page size (@page) instead of the paperWidth/paperHeight values.

parameters.name: waitDelay
parameters.description: Duration to wait (e.g., '5s', '1000ms') before converting. Useful for pages with JavaScript rendering.
